parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'project_id', p.id,
  'project_name', p.name,
  'project_type', p.project_type,
  'property_type', p.property_type,
  'property_area_m2', p.property_area_m2,
  'location_city', p.location_city,
  'current_phase', p.current_phase,
  'budget_target', p.budget_target,
  'started_at', p.started_at,
  'target_completion', p.target_completion,
  'handover_date', p.handover_date,
  'client_name', c.name,
  'briefing_summary', (SELECT b.summary FROM briefings b WHERE b.project_id = p.id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
  'design_option', (SELECT json_build_object('title', d.title, 'description', d.description) FROM design_options d WHERE d.project_id = p.id AND d.is_selected = true LIMIT 1),
  'cost_estimate_total', (SELECT total_estimated FROM cost_estimates WHERE project_id = p.id ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1),
  'has_active_aftercare', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM aftercare_incidents ai WHERE ai.project_id = p.id AND ai.status NOT IN ('resolved','closed','cancelled'))
) AS context
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id
WHERE p.id = $1::uuid;
SELECT content, model_recommended, temperature FROM agent_prompts WHERE agent_name='agent_client_concierge' AND prompt_type='system' AND is_active=true ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Build LLM Payload').first().json.project_id, $('Build LLM Payload').first().json.token_id, $('Build LLM Payload').first().json.question, $json.answer, $json.escalate, $json.escalation_reason, $json.llm_model, $json.llm_tokens_in, $json.llm_tokens_out, $json.llm_cost_usd, ($('Webhook').first().json.headers?.['x-real-ip'] || $('Webhook').first().json.headers?.['x-forwarded-for'] || 'unknown') ] }}

parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'architect_email'

parameters.subject: =ArquitAI Concierge — escalado de cliente {{ $('Load Project Context').first().json.context.client_name }}
parameters.message:
=

Cliente solicita atencion del arquitecto

Proyecto: {{ $('Load Project Context').first().json.context.project_name }}

Cliente: {{ $('Load Project Context').first().json.context.client_name }}

Pregunta del cliente

{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.question }}

Respuesta dada (con aviso de escalado)

{{ $('Parse LLM').first().json.answer }}

Razon escalado: {{ $('Parse LLM').first().json.escalation_reason }}

Conversation ID: {{ $('Save Conversation').first().json.id }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status:'ok', answer: $('Parse LLM').first().json.answer, escalated: $('Parse LLM').first().json.escalate, conversation_id: $('Save Conversation').first().json.id}) }}
